nasb.text: Hilkiah the second, Tebaliah the third, Zechariah the fourth; all the sons and relatives of Hosah were 13.

esv.text: Hilkiah the second, Tebaliah the third, Zechariah the fourth: all the sons and brothers of Hosah were thirteen.

cnv.text: 次子是希勒家、三子是底巴利雅、四子是撒迦利亞。何薩所有的兒子和兄弟共十三人。

ccb.text: 次子是希勒迦，三子是底巴利雅，四子是撒迦利亚。何萨的儿子及亲族共十三人。
